item.title: Blogs
item.description: The material here is overwritten by layouts/blog/list

item.title: Publications
item.description:
Journals

  1. 2025 Improved 3D acoustic emission source location in RC beams using multiple constructions of ΔT mapping
    Authors: Muhammad Usman Hanif; Soo-Yeon Seo; Muhammad Huzaifa Younus Toor
    Journal: Construction and Building Materials
  2. 2025 Machine learning in concrete durability challenges and pathways identified by RILEM TC 315-DCS towards enhanced predictive models
    Authors: Woubishet Zewdu Taffese; Benoît Hilloulin; Yury Villagran Zaccardi; Afshin Marani; Moncef L Nehdi; Muhammad Usman Hanif; Muralidhar Kamath; Sandra Nunes; Stefanie von Greve-Dierfeld; Antonios Kanellopoulos
    Journal: Materials and Structures
  3. 2025 Improved damage assessment of bridges using advanced signal processing techniques of CEEMDAN-EWT and Kernal PCA
    Authors: Hamza Ahsan Abdullah; Muhammad Usman Hanif; Muhammad Usman Hassan; Janita Mahnoor Shahid; Shaukat Ali Khan; Ather Ali
    Journal: Engineering Structures
  4. 2024 Shear Strengthening of RC Beams Using Partial-Length Near-Surface Mounted (PLNSM) CFRP Strips
    Authors: Senghong Khol; Soo-Yeon Seo; Hai Van Tran; Muhammad Usman Hanif
    Journal: International Journal of Concrete Structures and Materials
  5. 2024 A novel method for acoustic emission source location in CFRP-concrete debonding using ΔT mapping and DBSCAN algorithm
    Authors: Muhammad Usman Hanif; Soo-Yeon Seo; Hai Van Tran; Senghong Khol
    Journal: Measurement
  6. 2024 Time-dependent flexural behavior of the RC beams strengthened with FRP strips using different methods
    Authors: Hai Van Tran; Soo-Yeon Seo; Muhammad Usman Hanif; Senghong Khol
    Journal: Structures
  7. 2024 Influence of arch action on load-carrying capacity of double-sized industrial precast slabs; A combined numerical and experimental study
    Authors: Fayiz Amin; Alireza Bahrami; Hafiz Ahmed Waqas; M. Naveed; Ijaz Ali; Muhammad Usman Hanif; Ali Ejaz
    Journal: Results in Materials
  8. 2024 Numerical study on the design performance of wedge-type precast horizontal wall-slab joint for vertical load transfer
    Authors: Muhammad Usman Hanif; Soo-Yeon Seo; Muhammad Fawad
    Journal: Structures
  9. 2024 Integration of Bridge Health Monitoring System With Augmented Reality Application Developed Using 3D Game Engine–Case Study
    Authors: Muhammad Fawad; Marek Salamak; Muhammad Usman Hanif; Kálmán Koris; Muhammad Ahsan; Hadiya Rahman; Michael Gerges; Mostafa Mohamed Salah
    Journal: IEEE Access
  10. 2023 Monitoring and characterizing the debonding in CFRP retrofitted RC beams using acoustic emission technology
    Authors: Muhammad Usman Hanif; Soo-Yeon Seo; Hai Van Tran; Khol Senghong
    Journal: Developments in the Built Environment
  11. 2022 Damage assessment of reinforced concrete beams using cost-effective MEMS accelerometers
    Authors: Sultani Mulk Khan; Muhammad Usmam Hanif; Azam Khan; Muhammad Usman Hassan; Ahad Javanmardi; Atif Ahmad
    Journal: Structures
  12. 2021 Application of Structural Control Systems for the Cables of Cable-Stayed Bridges; State-of-the-Art and State-of-the-Practice
    Authors: Ahad Javanmardi; Khaled Ghaedi; Fuyun Huang; Muhammad Usman Hanif; Alireza Tabrizikahou
    Journal: Archives of Computational Methods in Engineering
  13. 2021 A regression model rinfor predicting the shear strength of RC knee joint subjected to opening and closing moment
    Authors: Moiz Tariq; Azam Khan; Javad Shayanfar; Muhammad Usman Hanif; Asad Ullah
    Journal: Journal of Building Engineeg
  14. 2021 Utilization of Solid Waste from Brick Industry and Hydrated Lime in Self-Compacting Cement Pastes
    Authors: Matiullah Shah; Muhammad Usman; Muhammad Usman Hanif; Iqra Naseem; Sara Farooq
    Journal: Materials
  15. 2019 Simulation-based non-linear vibration model for damage detection in RC beams
    Authors: Muhammad Usman Hanif; Zainah Ibrahim; Mohammed Jameel; Khaled Ghaedi; Huzaifa Hashim
    Journal: European Journal of Environmental and Civil Engineering
  16. 2019 State-of-the-art review of metallic dampers - testing; development and implementation
    Authors: Ahad Javanmardi; Zainah Ibrahim; Khaled Ghaedi; Hamed Benisi Ghadim; Muhammad Usman Hanif
    Journal: Archives of Computational Methods in Engineering
  17. 2018 Damage assessment of reinforced concrete structures using a model-based nonlinear approach – A comprehensive review
    Authors: Muhammad Usman Hanif; Zainah Ibrahim; Khaled Ghaedi; Huzaifa Hashim; Ahad Javanmardi
    Journal: Construction and Building Materials
  18. 2018 Finite Element Analysis of A Strengthened Beam Deliberating Elastically Isotropic And Orthotropic Cfrp Material
    Authors: Khaled Ghaedi; Zainah Ibrahim; Ahad Javanmardi; Mohammed Jameel; Muhammad Usman Hanif; Sardar Kashif ur Rehman; Meisam Gordan
    Journal: Journal of Civil Engineering Science and Technology
  19. 2018 Finite Element Simulation of Damage In RC Beams
    Authors: Muhammad Usman Hanif; Zainah Ibrahim; Khaled Ghaedi; Ahad Javanmardi; Sardar Kashif ur Rehman
    Journal: Journal of Civil Engineering Science and Technology
  20. 2018 Effect of incremental static damage on modal frequencies of reinforced concrete beams
    Authors: Muhammad Usman Hanif; Zainah Ibrahim; Huan Xin Lim; You Xian Hang
    Journal: International Journal of Integrated Engineering
  21. 2016 A new approach to estimate damage in concrete beams using non-linearity
    Authors: Muhammad Usman Hanif; Zainah Ibrahim; Mohammed Jameel; Khaled Ghaedi; Muhammad Aslam
    Journal: Construction and Building Materials

Conferences

  1. 2025 Real-Time Monitoring System for RC Frame Structures Using IoT and OCR
    Authors: Muhammad Huzaifa Younus Toor; Hai Van Tran; Soo-Yeon Seo; Muhammad Usman Hanif; Hyun-Do Yun;
    Conference: 2025 Spring Korean Concrete Institute (KCI) Academic Conference; (May 07 to 09; 2025)
    Location Jeju; South Korea
  2. 2024 Development of a BIM-Enabled Digital Twin for IoT-Based Structural Health Monitoring and Analysis
    Authors: Yamna Sarwar; Talha Ahmed Khokhar; Hamza Ahsan Abdullah; Janita Mahnoor Shahid; Shaheer Sohail; Adeena Abdul Haseeb; Muhammad Usman Hassan; Muhammad Usman Hanif; Ahmad Zaki
    Conference: The 3rd iteration of International Symposium on Civil; Environmental; and Infrastructure Engineering 2022 (3rd ISCEIE 2024); (August 07 to 08; 2024)
    Location Yogyakarta; Indonesia
  3. 2024 Time-dependent behavior of FRP-strengthened RC frame under sustained loading
    Authors: Hai Van Tran; Khol Senghong; Muhammad Usman Hanif; Kang-Su Kim; Hyun-Do Yun; Soo-Yeon Seo
    Conference: 2024 Spring Korean Concrete Institute (KCI) Academic Conference; (May 8 to 10; 2024)
    Location Gwangju; South Korea
  4. 2024 Monitoring the debonding in RC T-beams strengthened in shear with CFRP using acoustic emission technique
    Authors: Khol Senghong; Hai Van Tran; Muhammad Usman Hanif; Soo-Yeon Seo
    Conference: 2024 Spring Korean Concrete Institute (KCI) Academic Conference; (May 8 to 10; 2024)
    Location Gwangju; South Korea
  5. 2023 Effect of interfacial defects on bond-slip behavior between concrete and CFRP laminate
    Authors: Muhammad Usman Hanif; Soo-Yeon Seo; Hai Van Tran; Khol Senghong
    Conference: 2023 Autumn Korean Concrete Institute (KCI) Academic Conference; (November 1 to 3; 2023)
    Location Jeju; South Korea
  6. 2023 Time-dependent behavior of FRP-strengthened RC beams under sustained loading
    Authors: Hai Van Tran; Khol Senghong; Muhammad Usman Hanif; Kang-Su Kim; Hyun-Do Yun; Soo-Yeon Seo
    Conference: 2023 Autumn Korean Concrete Institute (KCI) Academic Conference; (November 1 to 3; 2023)
    Location Jeju; South Korea
  7. 2023 Shear strengthening of RC beams using partial-length NSM approach
    Authors: Khol Senghong; Hai Van Tran; Muhammad Usman Hanif; Soo-Yeon Seo
    Conference: 2023 Autumn Korean Concrete Institute (KCI) Academic Conference; (November 1 to 3; 2023)
    Location Jeju; South Korea
  8. 2023 Improved technique to find the damage location in retrofitted concrete specimens using acoustic emissions
    Authors: Muhammad Usman Hanif; Soo-Yeon Seo; Hai Van Tran; Khol Senghong; Hyun-Do Yun
    Conference: 28th Structural Engineers World Congress (SEWC); (October 18 to 20; 2023)
    Location Seoul; South Korea
  9. 2023 Sensing performance evaluation of Fiber Bragg Grating sensor attached to fiber-reinforced polymer sheet through shear test of concrete block
    Authors: Hai Van Tran; Khol Senghong; Muhammad Usman Hanif; Kang-Su Kim; Hyun-Do Yun; Soo-Yeon Seo
    Conference: Architectural Institute of Korea Spring Conference; (April 28; 2023)
    Location Busan; South Korea
  10. 2022 Finite element modelling of semi-rigid beam to column connection with partly hidden corbel
    Authors: Farooq Ahmed Athar; Zainah Ibrahim; Ashraf Adel Almohagry; Muhammad Usman Hanif; Ahmad Zaki
    Conference: 4th International Conference on Sustainable Innovation 2020 Technology; Engineering and Agriculture (ICoSITEA); (November 1 to 2; 2022)
    Location Medan; Indonesia
  11. 2022 Performance of precast beam to column connection with billet connector using FEM
    Authors: Ashraf Adel Almohagry; Zainah Ibrahim; Farooq Ahmed Athar; Muhammad Usman Hanif; Ahmad Zaki
    Conference: 4th International Conference on Sustainable Innovation 2020 Technology; Engineering and Agriculture (ICoSITEA); (November 1 to 2; 2022)
    Location Medan; Indonesia
  12. 2022 Modeling and Analysis of a Concrete Bridge using 3D Reconstruction Technique
    Authors: Hamza Tariq; Mudassir Ahmad; Ghufran Ahmad; Muhammad Waleed Afzal Khan; Muhammad Usman Hanif; Ahmad Zaki
    Conference: The 2nd International Symposium on Civil; Environmental; and Infrastructure Engineering 2022 (ISCEIE 2022); (August 10; 2022)
    Location Yogyakarta; Indonesia
  13. 2017 Piezo-resistive characteristics of graphene-based cement materials
    Authors: Sardar Kashif ur Rehman; Zainah Ibrahim; Mohammad Faisal Javed; Muhammad Usman Hanif
    Conference: 24th International Congress on Sound and Vibration; (July 23 to 27; 2017)
    Location London; United Kingdom
  14. 2017 Self-sensing carbon-based cement composite material
    Authors: Sardar Kashif ur Rehman; Zainah Ibrahim; Mohammad Faisal Javed; Muhammad Usman Hanif; Khaled Ghaedi
    Conference: 2nd International Conferences on Advances in Engineering and Technology (RTET); (February 09 to 10; 2017)
    Location Penang; Malaysia

item.title: Research

Previous Projects

Date: 2022 | Progress:

item.title: CV
item.description:
Usman Hanif

Assistant professor
Deparment of Technology and Innovation University of Southern Denmark
Odense, Denmark
Email: muha@iti.sdu.dk

| | | | | | |

Education

PhD in Structural Engineering — University of Malaya, Malaysia
2014 – 2018

MSc in Structural Engineering — NUST, Pakistan 2009 – 2012

BSc in Civil Engineering — UET Lahore, Pakistan
2005 – 2009

Academic Positions

Assistant Professor — University of Southern Denmark
2024 – Present
